notes: Claude Code is a non-GUI top-level controller supporting the stable Skyrim SE/AE profile and the Fallout 4 Experimental profile; new workspaces have no default game.
The workspace marker and Game Profile are authoritative; Claude Code does not infer the game from a Mod name or claim subagent tasks.
Top-level workflow actions use only the public smt.py JSON contract; handoff_file is optional diagnostic metadata, not a second command source.
Claude marketplace Skills do not grant GUI capability; GUI-only tasks must be blocked with handoff_target=codex.
